project.name: Tiny Transfer 手机端终极版
project.designRead: file-transfer app / mobile users on iPhone Safari / clean minimal / Apple HIG

pages.title: 扫码连接
pages.visualNorthStar: Clean QR code centered, pulsing glow animation, step indicators above, WiFi hint below, Apple HIG minimal style

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Apple HIG blue #007AFF primary, #F2F2F7 page bg, #1D1D1F text
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro / Noto Sans SC, 14px base
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: iOS-style cards, capsule buttons, subtle borders

pages.title: 文件传输
pages.visualNorthStar: Connected state with compact QR, file grid with type-colored icons, batch bar, FAB, bottom sheet upload trigger

continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Apple HIG blue #007AFF primary, #F2F2F7 page bg, #1D1D1F text
continuityAnchors.typographySystem: SF Pro / Noto Sans SC, 14px base
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: File cards with device tags, grid/list toggle, chip filters

pages.title: 上传弹窗
pages.visualNorthStar: iOS bottom sheet with drag handle, upload options, drop zone, file list with remove

continuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Top-only rounded corners on sheet, 14px option cards
continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: iOS action sheet style, dashed drop zone

pages.title: 文件预览
pages.visualNorthStar: Full-screen image preview with blur background, close button, file info overlay, download action

continuityAnchors.componentLanguage: iOS full-screen preview with blur backdrop
